scenes.visual: cinematic extreme wide shot of a vast digital landscape merging with organic nature, bioluminescent trees with circuit-board veins, golden hour light, volumetric fog, film grain, anamorphic lens
scenes.narration: Convergence is the moment where technology stops being a tool and starts being an extension of who you are.
scenes.music: ambient electronic, ethereal pads, sense of wonder, cinematic, 75 bpm

scenes.visual: cinematic close-up of hands gently touching a holographic brain made of light particles, warm amber tones, shallow depth of field, dust motes in light
scenes.narration: Your smartwatch knows your heart. Your AI knows your thoughts. Convergence is what happens when they learn to talk to each other.

scenes.visual: cinematic portrait of a woman looking toward camera with gentle confidence, warm backlight creating a halo effect, tears of light on cheeks, intimate and powerful
scenes.narration: This is Like One. Technology with a soul. Built by someone who needed it to survive.
